_comment: References proven untrustworthy and NOT repairable by refetch (live TeXeR render timeout). 2026-07-10: 12811/12830/12910/12921/03592 REMOVED — live-TeXeR refetch returned byte-equivalent refs, so those references are CORRECT and the divergence is an ENGINE gap (local-asy oracle also diverges there; version-specific rendering). 17 150-DPI refs (12991,1300x,143xx,144xx,146xx,14723) repaired same day.

12886.detail: local-asy oracle bbox diverges from ref dims (wR=0.683 hR=0.713); ref not trustworthy for size scoring

12911.detail: local-asy oracle bbox diverges from ref dims (wR=3.799 hR=5.656); ref not trustworthy for size scoring

12939.detail: ref saved at ~150 DPI instead of 240 (uniform ~1.6x undersize); local asy at 240 DPI agrees with HiTeXeR
